description: Marriage contract (ketubba) in the Palestinian style. Location: Tyre. Dated: August 1079 CE. Groom: Ḥalfon b. Aharon. Bride: Ghāliya bt. Musāfir. Early: 2 dinars. Late: 10 dinars. Dowry: 17 and 3/4 dinars [though the scribe mistakenly wrote 16 and 3/4]. In the hand of the ḥaver ʿAmram b. Ṣedaqa (see also T-S AS 150.230, T-S 16.136, T-S AS 156.394, and T-S AS 150.230). Edited by both Gil and Friedman. (NB: Friedman's book refers to the fragment as ENA 4101.36)
description_he: כתובה בסגנון ארץ ישראלי, צור, אוגוסט 1079. חתן: חלפון בן אהרן, כלה: ע'אליה בת מוסאפר. מוקדם: 2 דינרים, מאוחר: 10 דינרים.
